session_note: S23 final: 4 priorities executed (P0 deferred + P1 Micro + P2 Full + P3 Micro + P4 Micro). User reported regressions post-P1 (Voltkin trigger + SFX silent). Two Full-tier Council deliberations ran (Battle Ledger + PRIME-AUDIT preserved in conversation). Final root cause: cursor `<=` off-by-one in drainAudioEffects + runGodlyMatcher — click-handler-dispatched BOND_FORMED at same world.tick as cursor was silently skipped. One-char fix (`<=` → `<`) resolved BOTH bugs simultaneously. P4 verified by user playtest: Voltkin fires, SFX (claves + farts) play. NEXT-SESSION HANDOFF: user proposed Phase 2 Voltkin = autonomous creature actor (live entity with AI/physics/animation/attack behavior for ~10s, like Pac-Predator architecture pulled forward). 5-session blueprint saved at .claude/plans/ACTIVE_PLAN_voltkin_phase2.md. S24 = pure Full-tier Council deliberation, blueprint output, ZERO code. S25-S28 = phased implementation (entity infra → physics/locomotion → AI behavior → polish+1v1 sync).

priorities.label: Cursor off-by-one root-cause fix (<=  ->  < in drainAudioEffects + runGodlyMatcher)
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Micro tier (2-line surgical fix from P3 diagnostic data); user explicit 'go' on root-cause fix.
priorities.check_method: Diagnosed from P3 user-paste: BOND_FORMED total=7 (matcher probe before cursor check), firedEver=false (matcher cursor `<=` skipped), clave total=0 (audio cursor `<=` skipped). Root cause: click handler dispatches BOND_FORMED with tick=world.tick (un-advanced) between physics ticks; next frame drainAudio+matcher have cursor=world.tick from prev frame's set; effect.tick === cursor → `<=` skips. Fix: change comparison to `<` in both call sites (src/render/audioManager.ts:558 + src/main.ts:382). 432/432 tests still pass; build 455.36 KB unchanged. User playtest VERIFIED: Voltkin fires (cooldown 11425t ACTIVE per overlay), claves play (total=7 synthed=7), farts play.
